commands.review_summary:
The PR threads the spawned child agent id through subagent run registration, derives task records from child session keys when needed, makes gateway task filtering respect explicit task.agentId, and adds task/gateway regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +9, Tests +129. Total +138 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main builds child session keys from the target agent but resolves task.agentId without childSessionKey, then persists TaskRecord.agentId into SQLite. I did not run a live failing sessions_spawn repro because this review is read-only.
